title: OIE Community Catalog version manifest (manifests/<id>/<version>.json)
description: One immutable manifest per published version. Never edit after merge — publish a new version instead.

version.description: Version string; must equal the filename (<version>.json) and be numerically comparable for update detection.

maxEngineVersion.description: Highest supported engine version (inclusive), or null.

installerUrl.description: Absolute HTTPS URL of the artifact — any host (GitHub Releases, GitLab, S3, plain web server).

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the artifact bytes; verified by the engine before install.

restartRequired.description: true for extensions (activated on engine restart); false for imported content.

docsUrl.description: Absolute URL to a markdown document rendered in the store's detail view; relative links/images resolve against its directory.

ui.description: UI surfaces this version ships, declared in the package's oie.json and carried into this manifest by the publisher's release workflow. ['web','swing'] = both, ['web'] / ['swing'] = one store only, [] = server-only extension with no UI. Omit the key entirely when undeclared — the package then shows in both stores.
